[GITHUB REPOSITORIES] (topic: Create test.html displaying Hello World text)
# Hello World Web App

## Overview
A minimal, professional static web page that displays the text “Hello World” and shows the included sample.jpg image on the home page. It uses a single HTML file with inline CSS, requiring no build tools or external dependencies.

## Setup
1. Ensure the following files are in the same directory:
   - index.html
   - sample.jpg
2. No installation is required.

## Usage
- Open index.html in any modern web browser.
- The page will display a “Hello World” heading and render sample.jpg ben

[GITHUB REPOSITORIES] (topic: Create test.html displaying Hello World text)
# Hello World Web App

## Overview
A minimal, professional static web page that displays the text “Hello World” and shows the included sample.jpg image on the home page. It uses a single HTML file with inline CSS, requiring no build tools or external dependencies.

## Setup
1. Ensure the following files are in the same directory:
   - index.html
   - sample.jpg
2. No installation is required.

## Usage
- Open index.html in any modern web browser.
- The page will display a “Hello World” heading and render sample.jpg ben
